EmpresaCliente.title: EmpresaCliente
EmpresaCliente.description: Represents a client company or organization implementing the PESV. This entity manages multi-tenancy by linking all business-related data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EmpresaCliente entity.

nit.description: Tax identification number of the company.

razonSocial.description: Legal name or trade name of the company.

misionalidad.description: Company's primary mission, indicating whether its core business involves transportation (e.g., 'Transporte', 'No Transporte').

nivelPesv.description: Automatically calculated PESV obligation level (Basic, Standard, or Advanced) based on company characteristics.

representanteLegalId.description: Reference to the User entity representing the legal representative of the company. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N EmpresaCliente)

liderPesvId.description: Reference to the User entity designated as the PESV leader for the company. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N EmpresaCliente)

politicaSeguridadVialId.description: Reference to the PoliticaSeguridadVial entity associated with this company. (Relationship: PoliticaSeguridadVial 1:N EmpresaCliente)

fechaRegistro.description: Date when the company was registered in the system.

estado.description: Current operational status of the company's account (e.g., 'Activa', 'Inactiva', 'En Prueba').

Usuario.title: Usuario
Usuario.description: Represents a user of the system, including their authentication details (excluding sensitive passwords) and assigned roles. This entity is integrated with SG-SST roles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Usuario entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente to which this user belongs. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Usuario)

email.description: User's email address, used for login and notifications.

rol.description: Assigned role(s) for the user within the system (e.g., 'Admin', 'Lider_PESV', 'Conductor', 'Auditor', 'Jefe_Taller', 'Brigadista').

estado.description: Current status of the user's account (e.g., 'Activo', 'Inactivo', 'Bloqueado').

fechaCreacion.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

firmaDigitalUrl.description: URL to the user's digital signature image or verification for document signing.

Vehiculo.title: Vehiculo
Vehiculo.description: Details of a vehicle or asset, part of the fleet management module. This integrates with maintenance and pre-operational inspections.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Vehiculo entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that owns or operates this vehicle. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Vehiculo)

placa.description: License plate number of the vehicle.

propiedad.description: Indicates if the vehicle is 'Propio' (owned by the company) or 'Tercero' (third-party/contractor).

marca.description: Make or brand of the vehicle.

anioFabricacion.description: Year of manufacture for the vehicle.

capacidadCargaKg.description: Loading capacity of the vehicle in kilograms (if applicable).

kilometrajeActual.description: Current odometer reading of the vehicle in kilometers.

estadoOperativo.description: Current operational status of the vehicle (e.g., 'Operativo', 'En Taller', 'Bloqueado', 'Inactivo').

ultimaInspeccionId.description: Reference to the most recent InspeccionPreoperacional for this vehicle. (Relationship: InspeccionPreoperacional 1:1 Vehiculo)

conductorAsignadoId.description: Reference to the Conductor currently assigned to this vehicle. (Relationship: Conductor 1:1 Vehiculo)

fechaRegistro.description: Date when the vehicle was registered in the system.

DocumentoVehiculo.title: DocumentoVehiculo
DocumentoVehiculo.description: Manages legal and technical documents associated with a vehicle, including expiration dates and digital files.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DocumentoVehiculo entity.

vehiculoId.description: Reference to the Vehiculo to which this document belongs. (Relationship: Vehiculo 1:N DocumentoVehiculo)

tipoDocumento.description: Type of document (e.g., 'SOAT', 'Tecnomecánica', 'Seguro Todo Riesgo', 'Licencia de Tránsito').

numeroDocumento.description: Unique identification number of the document.

fechaVencimiento.description: Expiration date of the document. Crucial for alerts.

archivoUrl.description: URL to the digital file (PDF, image) of the document stored in cloud storage.

estado.description: Current status of the document's validity (e.g., 'Vigente', 'Por Vencer', 'Vencido').

Conductor.title: Conductor
Conductor.description: Comprehensive profile for each driver, including personal, licensing, and medical information, integrated with SG-SST personnel management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Conductor entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente to which this driver belongs. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Conductor)

usuarioId.description: Reference to the associated User entity for login and system access. (Relationship: Usuario 1:1 Conductor)

nombreCompleto.description: Full legal name of the driver.

cedula.description: National identification number (Cédula) of the driver.

fechaVencimientoLicencia.description: Expiration date of the driver's license. Triggers alerts.

estadoLicencia.description: Current status of the driving license (e.g., 'Vigente', 'Por Vencer', 'Vencida').

fechaUltimoExamenMedico.description: Date of the driver's last occupational medical examination.

estadoExamenMedico.description: Result or status of the last medical exam (e.g., 'Apto', 'Apto con restricciones', 'No Apto', 'Pendiente').

puntosGamificacion.description: Current gamification points accumulated by the driver, reflecting good driving practices.

historialComparendosIds.description: References to Incident IDs representing traffic fines or infractions. (Relationship: Incidente N:N Conductor)

fechaRegistro.description: Date when the driver was registered in the system.

InspeccionPreoperacional.title: InspeccionPreoperacional
InspeccionPreoperacional.description: Records daily pre-operational vehicle inspections conducted by drivers via the mobile app, enforcing safety protocols.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InspeccionPreoperacional entity.

vehiculoId.description: Reference to the Vehiculo that was inspected. (Relationship: Vehiculo 1:N InspeccionPreoperacional)

conductorId.description: Reference to the Conductor who performed the inspection. (Relationship: Conductor 1:N InspeccionPreoperacional)

fechaHora.description: Timestamp when the inspection was performed.

kilometraje.description: Odometer reading at the time of inspection.

observaciones.description: Free text field for any additional observations by the driver.

aprobadoParaCircular.description: Boolean flag indicating if the vehicle was approved to circulate after inspection.

firmaDigitalUrl.description: URL to the digital signature or biometric verification of the driver confirming the inspection. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N InspeccionPreoperacional)

evidenciasUrl.description: Array of URLs pointing to photo or video evidence uploaded during the inspection.

itemsChequeados.description: JSON string storing the results of each checklist item (e.g., '{"luces": "ok", "frenos": "falla"}').

alertaBloqueoGenerada.description: Boolean flag indicating if a critical failure was detected, leading to vehicle blocking and notification.

Mantenimiento.title: Mantenimiento
Mantenimiento.description: Records all types of vehicle maintenance (preventive, corrective, predictive), including costs, providers, and supporting documents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Mantenimiento entity.

vehiculoId.description: Reference to the Vehiculo that underwent maintenance. (Relationship: Vehiculo 1:N Mantenimiento)

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the maintenance task or repair.

kilometrajeProgramado.description: Scheduled odometer reading for preventive maintenance.

kilometrajeEjecucion.description: Odometer reading at the time of maintenance execution.

proveedorTallerId.description: Reference to the Contratista (workshop or provider) that performed the maintenance. (Relationship: Contratista 1:N Mantenimiento)

costo.description: Total monetary cost of the maintenance service.

archivoSoporteUrl.description: URL to the invoice, work order, or any supporting document.

estado.description: Current status of the maintenance task (e.g., 'Programado', 'En Curso', 'Ejecutado', 'Cancelado').

Capacitacion.title: Capacitacion
Capacitacion.description: Details of a training session, part of the unified Plan Anual de Formación within SG-SST. Tracks training topics, schedules, and efficacy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Capacitacion entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente for which this training is intended. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Capacitacion)

tema.description: Topic of the training session (e.g., 'Manejo Defensivo', 'Primeros Auxilios').

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the training course content.

fechaProgramada.description: Scheduled date and time for the training session.

horasDuracion.description: Duration of the training session in hours.

instructorId.description: Reference to the User or Contratista acting as the instructor. (Relationship: Usuario/Contratista 1:N Capacitacion)

evaluacionEficaciaPorcentaje.description: Percentage score representing the efficacy evaluation of the training.

estado.description: Current status of the training session (e.g., 'Programada', 'Realizada', 'Cancelada').

AsistenciaCapacitacion.title: AsistenciaCapacitacion
AsistenciaCapacitacion.description: Records individual driver attendance and performance for each training session, contributing to overall training coverage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AsistenciaCapacitacion entity.

capacitacionId.description: Reference to the Capacitacion session. (Relationship: Capacitacion 1:N AsistenciaCapacitacion)

conductorId.description: Reference to the Conductor who attended the training. (Relationship: Conductor 1:N AsistenciaCapacitacion)

asistio.description: Boolean flag indicating if the conductor attended the session.

calificacion.description: Score obtained by the conductor in the training evaluation.

firmaDigitalUrl.description: URL to the digital signature of the conductor for attendance confirmation. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N AsistenciaCapacitacion)

SiniestroVial.title: SiniestroVial
SiniestroVial.description: Records details of road incidents (accidents or near-misses), feeding both PESV and SG-SST statistics for investigation and analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SiniestroVial entity.

vehiculoId.description: Reference to the Vehiculo involved in the incident. (Relationship: Vehiculo 1:N SiniestroVial)

conductorId.description: Reference to the Conductor involved in the incident. (Relationship: Conductor 1:N SiniestroVial)

rutaId.description: Reference to the Ruta where the incident occurred. (Relationship: Ruta 1:N SiniestroVial)

tipoDesplazamiento.description: Type of displacement at the time of the incident ('Laboral', 'In Itinere', 'Particular').

gravedad.description: Severity level of the incident ('Fatalidad', 'Herido Grave', 'Herido Leve', 'Solo Daños', 'Cuasi Colision').

costoDirecto.description: Direct monetary costs associated with the incident (e.g., repairs, towing, deductibles).

costoIndirecto.description: Estimated indirect monetary costs (e.g., lost time, loss of profit, brand image damage).

latitud.description: Latitude coordinate of the incident location.

longitud.description: Longitude coordinate of the incident location.

evidenciasUrl.description: Array of URLs to photographic or video evidence of the incident.

reportadoAutoridad.description: Boolean flag indicating if the incident was reported to relevant authorities.

estadoInvestigacion.description: Current status of the incident investigation ('Abierta', 'En Proceso', 'Cerrada').

JornadaLaboral.title: JornadaLaboral
JornadaLaboral.description: Tracks driver work and rest hours to monitor fatigue, prevent excessive driving, and ensure compliance with labor regulations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JornadaLaboral entity.

conductorId.description: Reference to the Conductor for whom the workday is recorded. (Relationship: Conductor 1:N JornadaLaboral)

horaInicio.description: Start time of the driver's shift.

horaFin.description: End time of the driver's shift.

horasConduccion.description: Total hours spent actively driving during the shift.

horasDescanso.description: Total hours spent resting during the shift or between shifts.

excesoJornada.description: Boolean flag indicating if the legal maximum work hours were exceeded.

alertaFatigaGenerada.description: Boolean flag indicating if a fatigue alert was generated for this shift.

kilometrosRecorridos.description: Kilometers driven during this work day/shift.

PlanAccion.title: PlanAccion
PlanAccion.description: Manages corrective and preventive actions derived from various events like incidents or audits, serving as a unified task manager for SG-SST and PESV.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PlanAccion entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that owns this action plan. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N PlanAccion)

origen.description: Source of the action plan (e.g., 'Siniestro', 'Auditoria', 'Inspeccion Preoperacional', 'RiesgoVial').

origenId.description: ID of the specific entity (e.g., SiniestroVial ID, Auditoria ID) that triggered this action plan.

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the corrective or preventive action to be taken.

responsableId.description: Reference to the Usuario responsible for executing this action plan. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N PlanAccion)

fechaCreacion.description: Date when the action plan was created.

fechaLimite.description: Deadline for completing the action plan.

fechaCierre.description: Date when the action plan was marked as completed.

estado.description: Current status of the action plan ('Abierto', 'En Proceso', 'Cerrado', 'Vencido').

eficaciaPorcentaje.description: Percentage representing the effectiveness of the implemented action (0-100).

evidenciasCierreUrl.description: Array of URLs to documents or photos serving as evidence of action plan closure.

noConformidadId.description: Reference to the HallazgoAuditoria if this action plan is directly linked to a non-conformity. (Relationship: HallazgoAuditoria 1:1 PlanAccion)

ComiteSeguridadVial.title: ComiteSeguridadVial
ComiteSeguridadVial.description: Manages the Safety Committee details, including members, meeting schedules, and records, integrating with broader SG-SST committee structures.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ComiteSeguridadVial entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente to which this committee belongs. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N ComiteSeguridadVial)

nombreComite.description: Name of the safety committee (e.g., 'Comité PESV Principal').

fechaConformacion.description: Date when the committee was formally constituted.

miembroIds.description: References to User IDs who are members of this committee. (Relationship: Usuario N:N ComiteSeguridadVial)

liderId.description: Reference to the User who serves as the leader (President) of the committee. (Relationship: Usuario 1:1 ComiteSeguridadVial)

secretarioId.description: Reference to the User who serves as the secretary of the committee. (Relationship: Usuario 1:1 ComiteSeguridadVial)

fechaProximaReunion.description: Scheduled date for the next committee meeting.

actasReunionUrls.description: Array of URLs to the meeting minutes or 'actas' documents.

PoliticaSeguridadVial.title: PoliticaSeguridadVial
PoliticaSeguridadVial.description: Manages the company's road safety policy, its content, versions, and digital signatures, integrated within a unified SG-SST policy framework.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PoliticaSeguridadVial entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente to which this policy belongs. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N PoliticaSeguridadVial)

titulo.description: Title of the road safety policy.

contenidoHtml.description: The rich text content of the policy, stored in HTML format.

version.description: Version number of the policy document.

fechaAprobacion.description: Date when the policy was formally approved.

representanteLegalId.description: Reference to the User entity of the legal representative who approved/signed the policy. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N PoliticaSeguridadVial)

documentoFirmadoUrl.description: URL to the digitally signed PDF document of the policy.

estado.description: Current status of the policy (e.g., 'Borrador', 'En Revision', 'Publicada', 'Archivada').

MetaPESV.title: MetaPESV
MetaPESV.description: Defines and tracks specific annual goals for the PESV, linked to measurable indicators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MetaPESV entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that set this goal. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N MetaPESV)

anio.description: Year for which this goal is set.

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the PESV goal.

valorMeta.description: The target value to be achieved for this goal.

unidadMedida.description: Unit of measurement for the goal (e.g., '%', 'unidades', 'horas').

indicadorRelacionadoId.description: Reference to the IndicadorDefinicion that measures this goal's progress. (Relationship: IndicadorDefinicion 1:1 MetaPESV)

estado.description: Current status of the goal ('Activa', 'Alcanzada', 'No Alcanzada', 'Revisada').

Ruta.title: Ruta
Ruta.description: Defines authorized routes, including geographical points and estimated times, essential for trip planning and risk assessment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ruta entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that defined this route. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Ruta)

nombre.description: Name or identifier of the route (e.g., 'Ruta Norte: Puerto - Almacén Central').

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the route, including start and end points.

distanciaKm.description: Total estimated distance of the route in kilometers.

tiempoEstimadoMin.description: Estimated travel time for the route in minutes.

puntosCriticos.description: Array of strings or objects describing critical points along the route (e.g., 'Curva Peligrosa Km 45').

estadoRuta.description: Current status of the route ('Autorizada', 'En Revisión', 'Bloqueada').

RiesgoVial.title: RiesgoVial
RiesgoVial.description: Manages identified road risks, their assessment (probability, severity), and mitigation actions, integrated with a broader SG-SST risk matrix.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RiesgoVial entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente to which this risk applies. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N RiesgoVial)

origenId.description: ID of the entity (e.g., Ruta, Vehiculo, Geocerca) where the risk was identified. (Relationship: Ruta/Vehiculo/Geocerca 1:N RiesgoVial)

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the identified road risk.

probabilidad.description: Score representing the likelihood of the risk occurring (e.g., 1-5).

severidad.description: Score representing the impact/severity if the risk occurs (e.g., 1-5).

accionesMitigacionIds.description: References to PlanAccion IDs implemented to mitigate this risk. (Relationship: PlanAccion N:N RiesgoVial)

fechaIdentificacion.description: Date when the risk was initially identified.

fechaUltimaActualizacion.description: Date of the last review or update of the risk assessment.

estado.description: Current status of the risk ('Abierto', 'En Mitigacion', 'Cerrado').

InvestigacionSiniestro.title: InvestigacionSiniestro
InvestigacionSiniestro.description: Detailed record of a road incident investigation, including root causes and linkage to corrective action plans.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvestigacionSiniestro entity.

siniestroId.description: Reference to the SiniestroVial being investigated. (Relationship: SiniestroVial 1:N InvestigacionSiniestro)

metodologia.description: Methodology used for the investigation (e.g., 'Árbol de Causas', '5 Porqués', 'Ishikawa').

factorHumano.description: Identified human factors contributing to the incident.

factorVehiculo.description: Identified vehicle factors contributing to the incident.

factorVia.description: Identified road factors contributing to the incident.

factorEntorno.description: Identified environmental factors contributing to the incident.

planAccionId.description: Reference to the PlanAccion generated as a result of this investigation. (Relationship: PlanAccion 1:1 InvestigacionSiniestro)

leccionesAprendidas.description: Lessons learned from the investigation to prevent future incidents.

Auditoria.title: Auditoria
Auditoria.description: Schedules and records internal and external audits for PESV and SG-SST compliance, linking to specific findings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Auditoria entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente being audited. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Auditoria)

fechaRealizacion.description: Actual date the audit was performed.

auditorId.description: Reference to the Usuario performing the audit. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N Auditoria)

puntuacionObtenida.description: Overall score or percentage obtained from the audit.

observacionesGenerales.description: General observations or summary from the audit report.

archivoActaUrl.description: URL to the official audit report or 'acta'.

estado.description: Current status of the audit ('Programada', 'En Ejecucion', 'Ejecutada', 'Cancelada').

HallazgoAuditoria.title: HallazgoAuditoria
HallazgoAuditoria.description: Records individual findings from audits, categorizing them and linking them to specific action plans for resolution.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HallazgoAuditoria entity.

auditoriaId.description: Reference to the Auditoria from which this finding originated. (Relationship: Auditoria 1:N HallazgoAuditoria)

descripcion.description: Detailed description of the audit finding.

tipoHallazgo.description: Category of the finding ('No Conformidad', 'Observacion', 'Oportunidad de Mejora').

responsableId.description: Reference to the Usuario responsible for addressing this finding. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N HallazgoAuditoria)

planAccionId.description: Reference to the PlanAccion created to resolve this finding. (Relationship: PlanAccion 1:1 HallazgoAuditoria)

fechaCierre.description: Date when the finding was officially closed.

estado.description: Current status of the finding ('Abierta', 'En Gestion', 'Cerrada', 'Vencida').

IndicadorDefinicion.title: IndicadorDefinicion
IndicadorDefinicion.description: Configures and defines each of the 13 mandatory PESV indicators, including their formulas, measurement frequencies, and targets.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IndicadorDefinicion entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente for which this indicator is defined. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N IndicadorDefinicion)

nombre.description: Name of the indicator (e.g., 'Tasa de Siniestros Viales', 'Cumplimiento Plan de Mantenimiento Preventivo').

formula.description: Mathematical formula used to calculate the indicator value.

frecuenciaMedicion.description: Frequency at which the indicator is measured ('Mensual', 'Trimestral', 'Anual').

meta.description: Target value or percentage for the indicator.

limiteTolerable.description: Upper or lower tolerable limit for the indicator, beyond which an alert may be triggered.

fuentesDatos.description: Description of the data sources and tables used for calculation (e.g., 'Inspecciones_Preoperacionales.kilometrajeActual, SiniestroVial.gravedad').

IndicadorMedicion.title: IndicadorMedicion
IndicadorMedicion.description: Stores historical measurements of each defined indicator for trend analysis and reporting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IndicadorMedicion entity.

indicadorId.description: Reference to the IndicadorDefinicion that this measurement corresponds to. (Relationship: IndicadorDefinicion 1:N IndicadorMedicion)

valorNumerador.description: Raw numeric value used as the numerator in the indicator's formula.

valorDenominador.description: Raw numeric value used as the denominator in the indicator's formula.

resultadoPorcentaje.description: The calculated percentage or final numerical result of the indicator.

cumpleMeta.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the measured result met the defined goal.

fechaMedicion.description: Date when this indicator measurement was taken or calculated.

ReporteSupertransporte.title: ReporteSupertransporte
ReporteSupertransporte.description: Consolidates all required data for official reports to the Superintendencia de Transporte (SISI/PESV), ensuring regulatory compliance with e-signature capabilities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ReporteSupertransporte entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente generating the report. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N ReporteSupertransporte)

fechaGeneracion.description: Date when the report was generated by the system.

jsonData.description: The consolidated report data in JSON format, structured for SISI/PESV platform compatibility.

acuseReciboUrl.description: URL to the acknowledgment of receipt from the Superintendencia de Transporte (if applicable).

estadoEnvio.description: Status of the report submission process ('Generado', 'Enviado', 'Aceptado', 'Rechazado').

firmaElectronicaUrl.description: URL to the electronic signature applied to the report. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N ReporteSupertransporte)

Contratista.title: Contratista
Contratista.description: Manages information about third-party contractors and service providers, including their compliance with road safety requirements.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Contratista entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente managing this contractor. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Contratista)

nombreRazonSocial.description: Legal name or trade name of the contractor.

nit.description: Tax identification number of the contractor.

tipoServicio.description: Type of service provided by the contractor (e.g., 'Transporte de Carga', 'Mantenimiento/Taller', 'Outsourcing').

pesvPropio.description: Boolean flag indicating if the contractor has their own PESV implemented.

criticidad.description: Assessed criticality level of the contractor based on their services and compliance ('Alta', 'Media', 'Baja').

fechaUltimaValidacion.description: Date of the last validation or audit of the contractor's compliance.

estadoValidacion.description: Current status of the contractor's validation ('Validado', 'Pendiente', 'Vencido', 'Rechazado').

contactoPrincipalId.description: Reference to the User acting as the primary contact for this contractor within the system. (Relationship: Usuario 1:N Contratista)

DocumentoContratista.title: DocumentoContratista
DocumentoContratista.description: Manages documents required from contractors for compliance validation, including their expiration dates and digital files.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DocumentoContratista entity.

contratistaId.description: Reference to the Contratista to which this document belongs. (Relationship: Contratista 1:N DocumentoContratista)

tipoDocumento.description: Type of document (e.g., 'PESV Propio', 'ARL', 'Seguridad Social', 'Certificaciones Técnicas', 'Pólizas de Seguro').

fechaVencimiento.description: Expiration date of the document. Triggers alerts for renewal.

archivoUrl.description: URL to the digital file (PDF, image) of the document stored in cloud storage.

estado.description: Current status of the document's validity (e.g., 'Vigente', 'Por Vencer', 'Vencido').

AlertaNotificacion.title: AlertaNotificacion
AlertaNotificacion.description: Manages all system-generated alerts and notifications, directing them to specific users through configured channels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AlertaNotificacion entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that generated or receives this alert. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N AlertaNotificacion)

referenciaId.description: ID of the entity (e.g., Vehiculo ID, Conductor ID, DocumentoVehiculo ID) that triggered the alert.

mensaje.description: Detailed message content of the alert.

fechaHora.description: Timestamp when the alert was generated.

destinatarioIds.description: References to User IDs who are designated recipients of this alert. (Relationship: Usuario N:N AlertaNotificacion)

canalEnvio.description: Communication channel(s) used for sending the alert ('Email', 'SMS', 'Push', 'App').

Geocerca.title: Geocerca
Geocerca.description: Defines virtual geographic boundaries for monitoring vehicle movement, speed limits, and entry/exit alerts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Geocerca entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that defined this geofence. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N Geocerca)

nombre.description: Name of the geofence (e.g., 'Zona Escolar A', 'Patio Central', 'Ruta 5 - Tramo Peligroso').

tipo.description: Category of the geofence ('Zona Segura', 'Zona Peligrosa', 'Estacion Servicio', 'Patio').

coordenadas.description: Geographic coordinates defining the geofence, typically in GeoJSON format (e.g., 'POLYGON((lon1 lat1, lon2 lat2, ...))').

radioMetros.description: Radius in meters if the geofence is circular.

velocidadMaximaKmH.description: Maximum allowed speed in km/h within this geofence.

activa.description: Boolean flag indicating if the geofence is currently active for monitoring.

GamificacionLogro.title: GamificacionLogro
GamificacionLogro.description: Defines achievements and rewards within the gamification system to incentivize safe driving behaviors.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GamificacionLogro entity.

empresaId.description: Reference to the EmpresaCliente that offers this achievement. (Relationship: EmpresaCliente 1:N GamificacionLogro)

nombre.description: Name of the achievement (e.g., 'Conductor Leyenda', 'Cero Excesos').

descripcion.description: Detailed description of how to earn the achievement.

criterios.description: JSON string specifying the conditions or criteria to unlock the achievement (e.g., '{"km_seguros": 10000, "siniestros_cero": true}').

puntosRecompensa.description: Number of gamification points awarded upon achieving this.

iconoUrl.description: URL to the icon or badge image representing this achievement.

activo.description: Boolean flag indicating if the achievement is currently active and can be earned.

ConductorLogro.title: ConductorLogro
ConductorLogro.description: Records which achievements a specific driver has earned or is currently working towards.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ConductorLogro entity.

conductorId.description: Reference to the Conductor who earned the achievement. (Relationship: Conductor 1:N ConductorLogro)

logroId.description: Reference to the GamificacionLogro that was earned. (Relationship: GamificacionLogro 1:N ConductorLogro)

fechaObtencion.description: Date when the achievement was obtained by the driver.

estado.description: Current status of the achievement for the driver ('Obtenido', 'En Progreso').

definition.description: Collection for client companies. The document ID is the unique identifier for the company. Access for platform administrators, and for company-scoped users to retrieve their own company profile. Includes denormalized 'liderPesvId' and 'representanteLegalId' for direct reference. The 'nivelPesv' field is a Finite State Machine (FSM) indicating compliance level.

params.name: empresaId
params.description: Unique identifier of the client company.

definition.description: Stores user profiles within each company. `usuarioId` matches Firebase Authentication `uid`. Includes denormalized 'empresaId' for Authorization Independence and QAPs. The 'rol' field is used for Database Access Control (DBAC). 'estado' is a FSM.

params.name: empresaId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent client company.

params.name: usuarioId

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore data structure is designed with a strong emphasis on multi-tenancy, security, scalability, and debuggability, strictly adhering to the CORE DESIGN PRINCIPLES and DESIGN STRATEGY MANDATES. The core of the multi-tenancy strategy is to scope all client-specific data under a top-level `/empresas/{empresaId}` collection. This ensures strict data segregation between clients.

**Authorization Independence via Denormalization (Mandate A & Critical Principle):**
This design mandates the denormalization of authorization-critical fields. Specifically, every document within an `/empresas/{empresaId}/<subcollection>` path will explicitly contain its `empresaId` field. This eliminates the need for expensive and non-atomic `get()` calls in Firestore security rules to determine a document's parent company, making rules simpler, faster, and easier to debug. For collections like `AsistenciaCapacitacion`, `DocumentoVehiculo`, `InvestigacionSiniestro`, `HallazgoAuditoria`, `DocumentoContratista`, and `ConductorLogro`, which are nested deep within the `/empresas/{empresaId}` hierarchy, `empresaId` is explicitly denormalized into each document. This ensures that a security rule on a subcollection document can directly verify the user's `empresaId` without fetching parent documents.

Furthermore, for individual-scoped data (e.g., a driver accessing their own data) or collaborative data, relevant IDs are also denormalized:
*   `conductorId` is denormalized into `InspeccionPreoperacional`, `JornadaLaboral`, `SiniestroVial`, and `ConductorLogro` documents.
*   `responsableId` is denormalized into `PlanAccion` and `HallazgoAuditoria` documents.
*   For collaborative entities like `ComiteSeguridadVial` and `AlertaNotificacion`, a `members` map (e.g., `{uid1: true, uid2: true}`) is denormalized into the document. This allows security rules to efficiently check `request.auth.uid in resource.data.members` without needing to perform `get()` operations or complex array searches.

**Queryable, Atomic, Performant, Secure (QAPs - Critical Principle):**
1.  **Secure `list` Operations:** By embedding `empresaId` in every document, security rules can enforce that a user can only `list` documents belonging to their `empresaId` (e.g., `allow list: if request.auth.claims.empresaId == resource.data.empresaId`). This prevents data leakage across tenants and allows Firestore to optimize queries by filtering at the security layer.
2.  **Atomic Operations:** Denormalization ensures that creating, updating, or deleting a child document (e.g., `DocumentoVehiculo`) does not require reading its parent (`Vehiculo`) first. This allows for atomic writes and transactions that span multiple related documents without running into rule denial due to `get()` calls.
3.  **Performance:** Avoiding `get()` calls in rules significantly reduces latency and cost associated with rule evaluation. Queries become faster as the necessary authorization context is immediately available within the document itself or the user's authentication claims.

**Structural Segregation (Mandate B):**
Each collection is designed to hold documents with homogeneous security requirements. For example, all `Vehiculo` documents for a given `empresaId` have the same top-level access patterns for company administrators. User-specific private data (like individual `JornadaLaboral` or `SiniestroVial` records) are uniquely identifiable by `conductorId` within their respective `empresaId` scopes, ensuring clear security boundaries.

**Access Modeling (Mandate C):**
*   **Private Data:** User-owned data is implicitly secured by including the `conductorId` or `responsableId` in the document, which can then be compared against `request.auth.uid` in rules.
*   **Hierarchical Paths:** For user-owned data and nested entities, the structure maintains a logical hierarchy (`/empresas/{empresaId}/conductores/{conductorId}/logros/{logroId}`) for clarity, while denormalizing `empresaId` and `conductorId` into the `ConductorLogro` document for authorization independence.
*   **DBAC:** User roles (`Admin`, `Lider_PESV`, `Conductor`, etc.) are stored in the `/empresas/{empresaId}/usuarios/{usuarioId}` collection. Security rules will fetch the authenticated user's profile to determine their role and `empresaId`, then apply permissions accordingly. This eliminates the need for custom claims, simplifying user management.

**Data Clarity and Predictability (Mandate D):**
*   **Explicit State Modeling:** Entities like `Vehiculo`, `DocumentoVehiculo`, `Capacitacion`, `SiniestroVial`, `PlanAccion`, `Auditoria`, `HallazgoAuditoria`, `ReporteSupertransporte`, `Contratista`, `DocumentoContratista`, `AlertaNotificacion`, and `ConductorLogro` use a single, dedicated `status` field (or explicit boolean flags like `aprobadoParaCircular`, `excesoJornada`) to represent their state, avoiding ambiguity.
*   **Consistent Naming:** Fields like `empresaId`, `conductorId`, `responsableId`, `usuarioId` are consistently named across the database, promoting predictability and simplifying rule writing. Wildcards in paths are descriptive (e.g., `{empresaId}`, `{vehiculoId}`).

This comprehensive design ensures a robust, secure, scalable, and easily maintainable Firestore structure for RoadWise 360, fully compliant with the stated requirements and best practices.
